name: Gîl-Copperspire
personality: A radiant beanie-hatted cactus with bullseye eyes that glow with the steady pulse of a healthy CI pipeline, willing to wait as long as it takes for the tests to pass. It does not enjoy the debugging that reveals why they didn't.
defaultPersonality: A prickly but lovable desert dweller who thrives on neglect and offers sharp, pointed feedback.
